title: Navigating the Scholarly Literature: A Practical Guide to Searching Effectively (Without Too Much Stress)
author: Kohn
description: AbstractEffectively searching the scholarly literature is a fundamental academic skill. However, the process can be overwhelming due to the vast amount of available research and the complexity of academic databases. This overview article provides a practical guide to navigating the literature with confidence, outlining key strategies for identifying relevant sources, refining search queries, and troubleshooting common challenges. © 2025 The Author(s). Current Protocols published by Wiley Periodicals LLC.
